narrative:
Dudley (precinct in Noble County) has 368 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.8 percentage points.
